# Competitive Capabilities

State summary: 4 shipped, 1 partial, 2 proposed.

This page is generated from `bubbles/capability-ledger.yaml` and is the source-backed view of how Bubbles positions key framework capabilities against adjacent tools.

| Capability | State | Summary | Competitor Pressure | Docs | Evidence | Issues |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Workflow orchestration | shipped | Universal natural-language workflow entry point backed by explicit specialist orchestration and mode routing. | claude-code, roo-code, cursor, cline | [README.md](../../README.md); [docs/guides/WORKFLOW_MODES.md](../guides/WORKFLOW_MODES.md) | `bubbles/workflows.yaml`<br>bubbles/workflows.yaml, agents/bubbles.workflow.agent.md | — |
| Hard artifact ownership | shipped | Specialist-owned artifacts and routing gates prevent cross-owner edits and keep remediation packets precise. | claude-code, roo-code | [README.md](../../README.md); [agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md](../../agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md) | `bubbles/agent-ownership.yaml`<br>bubbles/agent-ownership.yaml, bubbles/workflows.yaml | — |
| Validate-owned certification | shipped | Certification authority stays with bubbles.validate and state.json ownership instead of leaking into execution agents. | claude-code, cursor | [README.md](../../README.md); [docs/guides/CONTROL_PLANE_DESIGN.md](../guides/CONTROL_PLANE_DESIGN.md) | `agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md`<br>agents/bubbles_shared/artifact-ownership.md, agents/bubbles_shared/agent-common.md | — |
| Supported interop apply | shipped | Review-only intake can promote explicit project-owned outputs through a safe apply flow while leaving framework-managed downstream files untouched. | claude-code, roo-code, cursor, cline | [README.md](../../README.md); [docs/guides/CONTROL_PLANE_ADOPTION.md](../guides/CONTROL_PLANE_ADOPTION.md); [docs/recipes/setup-project.md](../recipes/setup-project.md); [docs/guides/INTEROP_MIGRATION.md](../guides/INTEROP_MIGRATION.md) | `bubbles/scripts/interop-apply.sh`<br>bubbles/scripts/interop-intake.sh, bubbles/scripts/interop-apply.sh, bubbles/scripts/interop-apply-selftest.sh, bubbles/interop-registry.yaml | — |
| Repo-readiness guidance | partial | Advisory repo-readiness exists today, but trust packaging and evaluation clarity are still improving. | cursor, cline | [README.md](../../README.md); [docs/recipes/framework-ops.md](../recipes/framework-ops.md) | `bubbles/scripts/repo-readiness.sh`<br>bubbles/scripts/repo-readiness.sh, bubbles/scripts/cli.sh | — |
| Session-aware runtime coordination | proposed | Runtime lease coordination is defined as a framework proposal, but not yet shipped into the control plane. | claude-code, roo-code, cursor | [docs/issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md](../issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md); [docs/generated/issue-status.md](../generated/issue-status.md) | `docs/issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md`<br>docs/issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md | [session-aware-runtime-coordination.md](../issues/session-aware-runtime-coordination.md) |
| G068 DoD-Gherkin fidelity threshold tuning | proposed | The current G068 overlap heuristic has a documented false-positive gap and remains an open framework issue. | cline, roo-code | [docs/issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md](../issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md); [docs/generated/issue-status.md](../generated/issue-status.md) | `docs/issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md`<br>docs/issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md | [G068-word-overlap-threshold.md](../issues/G068-word-overlap-threshold.md) |
